summary: Docker buildx bake failed when wget attempted to download the nydus release asset from GitHub and received an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway response, causing the build layer to exit with code 1.
root_cause: wget returned HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway when downloading nydus release asset, indicating a transient server or gateway error from GitHub/remote host

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Explicit HTTP 502 status from wget indicates transient remote server/gateway failure

evidence.quote: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: wget command failed due to server error response, causing Dockerfile RUN layer to exit with code 1

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Network error occurred during download of external resource (GitHub release asset), not a build or code issue
Failure occurred at Dockerfile line 336 where nydus release asset is downloaded via wget

suggested_fix: Retry the buildx bake command, as the HTTP 502 is likely transient; optionally add retry logic to the wget command in Dockerfile line 336 (e.g., wget --retry-connrefused --waitretry=1 ...)
